choices.name: choiceDefaultFund
choices.choiceText: Use the default employer Super Fund

decisions.name: Was_a_Last_PW_Found
decisions.label: Was a Last PW Found?
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: FALSE - Was a Last PW Found?

rules.name: TRUE_Was_a_Last_PW_Found
rules.label: TRUE - Was a Last PW Found?

Flow.description: This Screen Flow is designed for use in a Salesforce Community, allowing employees to securely submit and manage their Superannuation Withholding records.

formulas.name: frmEffectiveDate
formulas.expression: If ( AND ( NOT ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , ISBLANK({!Get_Last_PW_Super.Id})), {!Get_Last_Pay.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} + 1, If ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_PW_Super.Id} ) , {!Get_Payee.tc9_pr__Payroll_Start_Date__c} , If ( AND ( {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} < TODAY() , ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , TODAY() , If ( AND ( {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} = TODAY() , ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , TODAY()+1 , If ( AND ( {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} > TODAY() , ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} + 1 , If ( AND ( {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} >= TODAY() , NOT ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , {!Get_Last_Pay.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} < TODAY() ) , {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c} + 1 , If ( AND ( NOT ( ISBLANK ( {!Get_Last_Pay.Id} ) ) , {!Get_Last_Pay.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} < TODAY() ), TODAY() , {!Get_Last_Pay.tc9_pr__Pay_Batch__r.tc9_pr__Payment_Date__c} + 1 ) ) ) ) ) ))

formulas.name: frmNomination
formulas.expression: If ( {!radioSelect_Superannuation_Fund_Type} = {!choiceDefaultFund} , "Default Employer Fund" , If ( {!radioSelect_Superannuation_Fund_Type} = {!choiceAPRA} , "APRA or RSA Fund" , "Self Managed Fund" ) )

Flow.label: 2c9 Utilities - Community Capture Superannuation Details

fields.name: helpText
fields.fieldText:
Let's Get Your Super Setup.


When adding your super fund, you’ll be able to choose one of three options:

1. Search for my Super Fund (make sure you have your USI handy)

  • Use this option if you have an existing super fund.
  • Search for your fund by name.
  • Enter your member number.
  • Upload any required documents.

2. Add a Self‑Managed Super Fund (SMSF)

  • Choose this if you manage your own fund.
  • Enter all required SMSF details such as:
    • Fund ABN, name, address
    • Contact details
    • ESA
    • Bank account details
  • Upload any supporting documents.

3. Use the Default Employer Super Fund

  • Select this to use the super fund chosen by your employer.
  • If no default fund is available, you’ll be asked to select another option.

Ready? Tap Next to add your super details.

fields.name: txtnoPayee
fields.fieldText:
No Active Payee record found for this user record.

Please contact your payroll department.

fields.name: displayNoFileAPRA
fields.fieldText:
You must attach a letter from the fund trustee or RSA provider confirming that the fund or RSA:

  • is a complying fund or RSA, and
  • will accept payments from your employer.

This letter may contain other information to help your employer make super contributions using the SuperStream standard.

fields.name: displayNoFileSMSF
fields.fieldText: Please note we will only make payments into your SMSF if you have a document confirming that the SMSF is regulated - this can be printed from superfundlookup.gov.au and uploaded into the file upload.

fields.name: displayExistingFund
fields.fieldText:
Your existing superannuation membership details are as follows.


Fund Name: {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Superannuation_Fund__r.tc9_pr__Fund_Name__c}

Member Number: {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Super_Membership_Number__c}

Effective Date: {!Get_Last_PW_Super.tc9_pr__Effective_Date__c}

fields.name: radioSelect_Superannuation_Fund_Type
fields.fieldText: How would you like to add your Super Fund?

fields.name: usiHelp
fields.fieldText: Make sure you have your USI handy

fields.name: displayDefault
fields.fieldText:
Default employer fund details


Business name: {!Get_Default_Fund.tc9_pr__Payment_Entity__r.Name}

ABN: {!Get_Default_Fund.tc9_pr__Payment_Entity__r.tc9_pr__ABN__c}


Super fund name: {!Get_Default_Fund.tc9_pr__Default_Superannuation_Fund__r.tc9_pr__Fund_Name__c}

Unique superannuation identifier (USI): {!Get_Default_Fund.tc9_pr__Default_Superannuation_Fund__r.tc9_pr__Unique_Superannuation_Identifier__c}

Phone: {!Get_Default_Fund.tc9_pr__Default_Superannuation_Fund__r.tc9_pr__Fund_Phone__c}

fields.name: displayDefaultError
fields.fieldText:
Your employer has not nominated a default superannuation fund.

Please contact your employer or choose another option.

fields.name: txtnodefaultfund
fields.fieldText:
Your employer has not nominated a default superannuation fund.

Please contact your employer or choose another option.
